event: chest radiography patchy air space opacity in the right upper lobe suspicious for pneumonia
admitted to another hospital for elective right total knee replacement
went to the hospital in a healthy state
oxygen requirements increased to 10 L high-flow nasal cannula
CXR bilateral alveolar infiltrates and interstitial edema consistent with ARDS
high-dose vitamin C infusion started 11 g/24 h continuous
CXR significant improvement of pneumonia and interstitial edema
spontaneous breathing trial with CPAP/PS successful
extubated to 4 L oxygen via nasal cannula
transferred from the Critical Care Unit to an isolation room
oxygen saturation 92% while breathing ambient air
CXR nearly complete resolution of the infiltrates and interstitial edema
